## Checklist

- [ ] Agent progress messages follow the `[prefix] ▶ ...` format
- [ ] New agents include the model-identification block at startup
- [ ] Intermediate files are named with a leading `.` (so they are gitignored)
- [ ] `plugin.json` updated if new agents or skills were added
- [ ] README updated if behavior or structure changed
